kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '9391805601' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Enter your mobile number']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'We've sent a 6-digit code to'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Element Should Be Enabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.msg: Typing text '18597' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Search order by ID']'.

kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: order is present with this order id
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('CTRL+A+BACKSPACE',) to xpath=//input[@placeholder='Search order by ID'] element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: order is not present with this order id
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

Verify cancel order functionality. Validation: 1. Open New Order section 2. Verify new order card is available 3. Accept the order 4. Open Add Discount section 5. Apply discount using slider 6. Save the discount 7. Open Cancel Order option 8. Select cancellation reason 9. Confirm order cancellation 10. Verify order is cancelled successfully 11. If no order is available, display appropriate message

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: No order present with "Delivery boy assigend " status
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

Verify the Order History dashboard counts. Validation: 1. Open Order History dashboard. 2. Capture Delivered order count. 3. Capture In-Progress order count. 4. Capture Rejected order count. 5. Capture Expired order count. 6. Display all counts in console logs.

kw.name: Verify order history dashboard
Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Verify the Notify Care Executive functionality for an order with "Delivery Boy Assigned" status. Validation: 1. Check if an order card with "Delivery Boy Assigned" status is present. 2. Open the order details page. 3. Scroll to the bottom of the order details. 4. Verify the "Notify Care Executive" button is displayed. 5. Click on "Notify Care Executive". 6. Navigate back to the previous screen.

kw.name: Verify notify care executive
Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
